privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real NASA eCRM-001 conceptual aircraft model (eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3). The expected output path ('/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM001_winglet.vsp3') explicitly matches the export_result.sh queries. The target values required by the synthetically generated winglet specification (Cant Angle 72.0, Span 0.85, Sweep 35.0, and Taper Ratio 0.30) are all correctly bounded by the spec ranges claimed in the metadata and strictly enforced via XML parsing in verifier.py.
